original_statement: how many more bronze metals does hungary have than canada?
mutated_statement: how many more something does one place have than another place?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Item/generalization: specific country names replaced by generic location placeholders | specific medal item replaced by a vague placeholder (hungary→one place | canada→another place | bronze metals→something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从提供的日志可见agent在judge_thought与critique中多次明确指出问题模糊性（judge_thought中写到“The question is ambiguous… cannot be uniquely validated”“问题不明确”“无法确定”；critic也指出“question is ambiguous… choices unsupported”），说明agent意识到了不确定性。但在iteration 0中，agent仍然基于未被授权的假设（将“one place/another place”视为表中第一、第二名，将“something”视为总奖牌）给出了具体答案“2”，且被后续critic标为错误（incorrect_step=3）。之后agent在refine阶段改为“Cannot be determined”。总体行为表现是：虽然意识到目标模糊并在反思中承认这一点，但最初仍然进行了猜测并给出具体回答，因此归类为“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”。
